who: compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory reports/month
offer: For compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory reports/month, manual report generation causes late filings. We automate the report generation and filing instead of manual report generation and filing.
problem: Manual generation and filing of regulatory reports is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for compliance officers
Indie Hackers discussions on report generation tools
DM outreach to compliance officers with demo video
Engage in community forums for compliance tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and dashboard for tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Simplify onboarding process with fewer steps
